test-case.description: returns a pedagogical warning without throwing when SecretManagement is unavailable
test-case.name: OpsToutatis credential wrapper.returns a pedagogical warning without throwing when SecretManagement is unavailable

test-case.description: supports Set/Get credential round-trip with SecureString
test-case.name: OpsToutatis credential wrapper.supports Set/Get credential round-trip with SecureString

test-case.description: imports and validates a valid inventory and playbook
test-case.name: OpsToutatis inventory and playbook engine.imports and validates a valid inventory and playbook

test-case.description: returns a clear french error for invalid IP address in inventory
test-case.name: OpsToutatis inventory and playbook engine.returns a clear french error for invalid IP address in inventory

test-case.description: returns a clear french error when playbook references an unknown host
test-case.name: OpsToutatis inventory and playbook engine.returns a clear french error when playbook references an unknown host

test-case.description: detects missing playbook file
test-case.name: OpsToutatis inventory and playbook engine.detects missing playbook file

test-case.description: detects syntax errors with line information
test-case.name: OpsToutatis inventory and playbook engine.detects syntax errors with line information

test-case.description: detects missing key, invalid type, missing reference and unsupported OS classes
test-case.name: OpsToutatis inventory and playbook engine.detects missing key, invalid type, missing reference and unsupported OS classes

test-case.description: imports without errors
test-case.name: OpsToutatis module import.imports without errors

test-case.description: exports expected public commands
test-case.name: OpsToutatis module import.exports expected public commands

test-case.description: returns empty string when input is empty
test-case.name: OpsToutatis redaction engine.returns empty string when input is empty

test-case.description: masks password assignment values
test-case.name: OpsToutatis redaction engine.masks password assignment values

test-case.description: masks pwd assignment while preserving surrounding text
test-case.name: OpsToutatis redaction engine.masks pwd assignment while preserving surrounding text

test-case.description: masks bearer token values
test-case.name: OpsToutatis redaction engine.masks bearer token values

test-case.description: masks JWT tokens
test-case.name: OpsToutatis redaction engine.masks JWT tokens

test-case.description: masks private key blocks
test-case.name: OpsToutatis redaction engine.masks private key blocks

test-case.description: masks argument after -AsCredential
test-case.name: OpsToutatis redaction engine.masks argument after -AsCredential

test-case.description: does not alter regular sentence containing the word password
test-case.name: OpsToutatis redaction engine.does not alter regular sentence containing the word password

test-case.description: masks multiple sensitive patterns in one line
test-case.name: OpsToutatis redaction engine.masks multiple sensitive patterns in one line

test-case.description: creates expected session directory and log files
test-case.name: OpsToutatis session and logger engine.creates expected session directory and log files

test-case.description: does not write logs to console without PassThru
test-case.name: OpsToutatis session and logger engine.does not write logs to console without PassThru

test-case.description: never writes clear-text password in log files
test-case.name: OpsToutatis session and logger engine.never writes clear-text password in log files

test-case.description: writes close summary with counters and duration
test-case.name: OpsToutatis session and logger engine.writes close summary with counters and duration

test-case.description: keeps plain banner rendering stable (golden file)
test-case.name: OpsToutatis UI engine.keeps plain banner rendering stable (golden file)

test-case.description: falls back to plain mode when virtual terminal support is disabled
test-case.name: OpsToutatis UI engine.falls back to plain mode when virtual terminal support is disabled
